title: lenticula gibba
intro: Lenticula gibba, also known as the Hairy Buttercup or Lenticula, is a type of flowering plant in the Ranunculaceae family. This plant contains alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lenticula gibba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Lenticula gibba can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits.
